properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I approach the throne of glory Nothing in my hands I bring But the promise of acceptance From a good and gracious King

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will give to You my burden As You give to me Your strength Come and fill me with Your Spirit As I sing to You this praise

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You deserve the greater glory Overcome, I lift my voice To the King in need of nothing Empty handed I rejoice

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You deserve the greater glory Overcome with joy I sing By Your love I am accepted You’re a good and gracious King

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: O what grace that You would see me As Your child and as Your friend Safe, secure in You forever I pour out my praise again

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Holy, holy, Lord Almighty Good and gracious Good and gracious Holy, holy, Lord Almighty Good and gracious King
